name: SilverSPAC Inc. Class A Ordinary Share
summary: SilverSPAC Inc. is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. SPACs are shell corporations that exist to raise capital through an IPO for the purpose of acquiring an existing company. It is headquartered in New York, NY.
